name: WIDEPOINT CORP
summary: WidePoint Corporation is a provider of Technology Management as a Service (TMaaS) offering federally certified communications management, identity management, telecom lifecycle management, digital billing and analytics, and IT as a Service. As one of two DoD-designated External Certificate Authorities, WidePoint provides multifactor authentication and digital certificates. It serves primarily U.S. federal government clients, with 77% of 2025 revenues from the DHS Cellular Wireless Managed Services 2.0 ID/IQ Contract, and also serves commercial enterprises.

products.name: Technology Management as a Service (TMaaS)
products.description: Comprehensive mobility management, communications management, and identity management solution delivered via secure federal and enterprise portals.

products.name: Telecom Lifecycle Management
products.description: Hosted solution providing full visibility and management of telecom assets for public and private sector enterprises.

products.name: Mobile and Identity Management
products.description: Federally certified digital certificates and credentials enabling multifactor authentication for government and commercial customers.

products.name: Digital Billing and Unified Communications Analytics
products.description: Interactive billing communications and analytics solutions for large communications service providers via a self-serve portal.

products.name: IT as a Service (ITaaS)
products.description: Comprehensive IT outsourcing including cybersecurity, cloud services, network operations, AI implementation, and Microsoft stack technologies.

products.name: Carrier Services
products.description: Procurement, processing, and payment of communications carrier invoices including phone, data, satellite, and mobile services.

partnerships.description: WidePoint operates as subcontractor to large systems integrators pursuing large government and commercial market opportunities.
Approved subcontractor for GSA Alliant 2 government-wide acquisition contract.
Approved subcontractor for GSA EIS contract vehicle.
Approved subcontractor for GSA Connections II contract vehicle.
Approved subcontractor for NIH Chief Information Officer Solutions and Partners CIO-SP3 contract.
